sections.title: Your details
sections.description: Please provide the name and details of the lead person and the company hosting this event.

questions.title: Event URL
questions.description: Share the link where your attendees will register

questions.title: Event information
questions.placeholder: A hackathon for commercial real estate

questions.title: How many people are you inviting?
notes: Warning: Your selected venue seats a maximum of {{venueCapacity}} people.
Warning: The maximum capacity across our venues is 150 people.

questions.title: Will your event run overnight?
questions.description: Will your event run between the hours of 12am to 9am?
options: Yes - our event will run through the night
No - our event will finish before midnight and resume again after 9am

questions.title: Do you require any special equipment?
questions.placeholder: Screens, microphones for speakers, 3D printers, 5-axis CNC mills....

sections.title: Sponsors and supporting organisations
sections.description: If you're looking for sponsorship - tell us! We have a vast network of people who can help.

questions.title: List of sponsors
questions.description: Please list the names of any organisations that are supporting the event financially.
questions.placeholder: Union Aerospace Corporation, Umbrella Corporation, UNATCO

questions.title: List of outcomes
questions.description: What are you (and any sponsors) hoping to achieve from hosting your event?

sections.title: Billing
body: The venue hire fee matches your catering spend, rounded down to the nearest £250 (minimum £250).
For example, if you spend £600 on catering, the venue hire fee is £500.
We require payment details to recover this cost.
We may waive this fee at our discretion for communities that we sponsor.

questions.title: Invoicing organisation
questions.description: Please list the full company name as it appears on Companies House or other registry.

questions.title: Invoice email address
questions.description: Please ensure this email address is able to receive invoices.

sections.title: Damage waiver
sections.description: By submitting this form, you agree that:
body: You will ensure that the venue is returned in its original condition
You will cover the venue hire fee as stated above
You will include the Halkin logo on any marketing and social media materials
